steps.title: Look for confirmation
steps.content: The first sentence says Duchamp intended Fountain to challenge prevailing ideas about art. The second says the sculpture did just that. The transition should confirm that the intended effect actually happened.

steps.title: Use the confirming transition
steps.content: Choice A signals similarity, Choice C signals substitution or contrast, and Choice D adds a separate point. The sentence needs a word that affirms the previous claim by showing the sculpture fulfilled its purpose. The answer is B.
